name: Crock Pot Brunswick Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Squish up the tomatoes with clean hands.
2. Chop the chicken into pieces.
3. Break up all the beef and mix together with tender loving care using clean hands.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients (tomatoes, cream corn, whole kernel corn, and grated onion).
5. Cook everything in the crock pot on low temperature overnight or for all day.
This recipe is easy and delicious!
